creator: ngie@FreeBSD.org
text:
The fix made here needs to be added to the devel/atf port as a patch to mute the Jenkins failure emails related to it (the testcase has failed a *lot* over the past few months):
https://github.com/jmmv/atf/commit/0e546407567ea858e261e72f75c5ed61e07d0ddf.patch

Please see the related bug for more information.
